title: Spicy Dense Adventurous Thai Navy Bean Stir-fry
description: This dish features spicy, dense white navy beans in a flavorful sauce with aromatic spices and fresh herbs, ideal as a vegan-friendly dinner option.

ingredients.name: 1 tsp ground red chili pepper (serrano or cayenne)

instructions: Heat oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Add minced garlic and red chili pepper, sautéing for about 1 minute.
Add navy beans, fish sauce, soy sauce, brown sugar, water, ginger powder, salt, and pepper to the skillet. Stir well to combine.
Increase heat to high, bring the mixture to a boil then reduce to medium-low. Simmer for about 5-7 minutes or until the liquid has reduced slightly and flavors are well incorporated.
Serve hot over steamed rice with fresh herbs like cilantro or basil on top if desired.
